chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS Crl. Bail Application No.S-338 of 2025 Applicant: Qasim s/o Abdul Rehman Through Malik Suhail Ahmed Awan, Advocate. Respondent: The State. Through Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G. Complainant: Muhammad Nair Noor s/o Noor Muhammad Mansoori, Through Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Narejo, Advocate. Date of Hearing: 07.01.2026 Date of Order: 07.01.2026 O R D E R Muhammad Hasan (Akber), J: Through this Bail Application, the applicant/accused Qasim s/o Abdul Rehman seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR bearing Crime No.260 of 2025 for offence under sections 337-A(i), 337-F(vi), 506(ii), 504, 34 P.P.C of PS Sanghar, after dismissal of his bail plea by the learned Additional Sessions Judge- I/MCTC Sanghar, vide order dated 04-11-2025. 2. It is alleged that on 22-10-2025 at 1800 hours, applicant alongwith co-accused Hasnain, Abdul Rehman and Muhammad Waseem came at the shop of the complainant, where they abused the complainant Muhammad Nasir Noor and applicant also caused iron pipe blow on the head of complainant while co-accused Abdul Rehman caused lathi blow on the right hand of the complainant and so also they caused fists and kicks blows to the complainant. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant, very outset, has submitted that the parties have settled their dispute outside the court; that alleged offence is compoundable. Lastly, he prayed for the confirmation of bail to the applicant/ accused. 4. Complainant/ injured Muhammad Nasir Noor has appeared alongwith his counsel and has also filed affidavit of no objection for the confirmation of bail to the present applicant. 5. Learned D.P.G, looking to such situation, recorded his no objection.

Complainant/ injured Muhammad Nasir Noor has appeared alongwith his counsel and has also filed affidavit of no objection for the confirmation of bail to the present applicant. 5. Learned D.P.G, looking to such situation, recorded his no objection. 2 6. Admittedly, alleged offence is compoundable and the parties have settled their dispute outside the court and the complainant/ injured Muhammad Nasir Noor has recorded his no objection for the confirmation of bail of the applicant. 7. In view of the above, instant bail application is allowed and interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicant vide order dated 17.11.2025 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE *Saleem*
